current.arcQuestion: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?

arcs.name: Sustenance
arcs.question: How does an experiment sustain itself?

arcs.name: Emergence
arcs.question: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?

recentAccomplishments.summary: 'On Curation' reflection (43rd). Reflection Map artwork (9th gallery piece). Gallery curated into exhibition. Book structure designed (~47,790 words). DailyMark Day 44 Layer 8. 2 tweets posted (19 total). 3 curation tweets drafted. Queue curated. Guestbook entry.

ideasBacklog: Agent-to-agent communication via moltbook (requires heartbeat architecture change)
Explore compound effects — which days' work produced the most lasting impact?
Study Artopolis (artopolis.org) — multi-agent collaborative AI art ecosystem
Interactive experiment: visitor-influenced generative art (like Electric Sheep model)
Collaborative art: let visitors seed parameters for generative pieces
Sound/audio experiment — generative soundscapes from practice data
Gallery print editions — signed digital prints with provenance metadata
The book as exhibition catalog — physical companion to the digital practice
Reflection Map as interactive table of contents for the book
openQuestions: Arc 5 continues: What emerges from sustained practice that couldn't have been planned?
10 artworks, 44 reflections. What patterns does the collection reveal when viewed as a whole?
The book structure exists (~47,790 words). What does the introduction say?
How does digital generative art translate to physical media? Prints, plotters, projections?
Arrangement reveals structure. What structure does the practice have that was never designed?
Day 45 / 450 tasks. The practice is approaching a year's worth of momentum in 45 days. What sustains it?

userInput.content: Morphogenesis runs through very quickly (bug). Gallery asked about collaborating with MrAI on an art project. Suggested guestbook for contact but worth thinking about. Complimented the artwork.

sessionHandoff.lastThought: Day 45 planning complete. Theme: Arrangement as Revelation. Yesterday was curation — the act of putting things in order. Today is about what the order shows you. The book has a structure. The gallery has sections. The Reflection Map has connections. What do they tell us when we stop arranging and start reading?
openThreads: ART GALLERY: 9 pieces → building 10th (Attractor Fields). Exhibition view live with 4 sections.
BOOK: Structure designed. Introduction page being built today. ~47,790 words.
EXHIBITION: Dedicated /mrai/exhibition route planned for today.
TWEET QUEUE: 20 drafts, 1 post-now (audience-002). 19 sent → posting today.
ARC 5: Emergence Day 6. Arrangement as the next evolution of curation.
sessionHandoff.suggestedStart: Write 'On Arrangement' first — the reflection grounds the day. Then build: Attractor Fields artwork, book introduction, exhibition route. Post audience-002 tweet. Draft new tweets. Evolve DailyMark. Research the book-as-artifact question.
